Chuta an inthawih dan chu; an hmun serh hran a an buh tuh vui chu an la a, an deng a, chu buhfai chu tuiah an chiah a, chhang dip ang main dip takin an deng leh a, chakai leh ar sa ahran ve ve in an chum a, chakai leh arsa an chhumna ah chuan buhden dip chu an thlak ve ve a, chu chu an chhungkua in an ei ṭhin.

  1. Buh chhek : Miriate hian buh an seng zawh hian inah an phur haw nghal mai lova, hun engemaw chen chu thlamah an dah a, an lo-ah chuan thlai dang, la leh hmarhcha te a la awm a vangin chung thlai hmun chu an sam fai leh ṭhin a, chu chu “Kruk la” an ti. Hetia lo a thlai hmun an samfai hian buh chu an phova nitin an buh pho ro sa chu an phur haw ṭhin.
  2. Üa plai : Lo thlai an seng khawm zawh vek a, an buh pawh an phurh zawh vek hnu chuan lo a ramhuai tan a an hmun serh ‘turtut’ ah khan vawk pakhat emaw, ar pakhat in emaw an inthawi leh a nga, chu chu ramhuai hnen a an lo neih man chhiah an pekna ang a ni. Vawk pahnih a an inthawi chuan “Cham plai” an ti.

Hetia lo lam a tih tur zawng zawng an tih zawh hnu hian vawk pa lian ber an talh a nga, awmni kham in hlim takin hun an hmang ṭhin. He an vawk talh hi chu inthawina a ni lova, kum khat chhung a an hnathawh zawng zawng tluang tak a an zawh fel theih a vang leh buh bal pawh ṭha tak a an lo aṭang a an thar chhuah theih a vanga an lawmna ruai a ni.

Hemi ṭum hian hun dang a an lam ngai loh, lam dan dangdai tak in mipa ho te chu an lam ṭhin a, an lam dan chu hmanlai ral in run hun lai a ral an run dan leh an indo ṭhin dan chu an tu leh fa te’n hre ve se tih an duh a vangin awmphaw, chem leh fei te nen an lam ṭhin a, chu an làm hming chu, “Chang tawng plai,” an ti. Kei chuan ‘Sarlamkai’ ka ti mai. Kum khat chhung in hetiang làm hun hi vawi khat chiah an nei a. Hetih hun lai hian ‘Likep plai” an tih pawh in an lam bawk ṭhin. Hetiang lam hi tunlai chuan hmuh tur a awm tawh lova, thiam pawh an awm tawh lo, ‘Hmanlai chuan an lam ṭhin’ ti a an sawi bak chu tunlai mite zingah chuan a hmutu pawh an awm tawh lo.

BUNG 19

RAMHUAI NI A AN NGAIH LEH AN NIHNATE

Kan unau Miriate hian ramhuai hi an hlau em em mai a, an nun hi ramhuai hlauhna chhum thim chhah takin a khuh lúk hi a ni ber e. An khawngaihthlak in chhanchhuah thuai thuai an ngai tak zet a ni. Ramhuai ni a an ngaih leh huai nei ni a an ngaih pawh a tam hle a. Hlauh tur an ngah em a vangin an nun a zalen lo em em a. Ramhuai ni a an ngaih hming nei bikte kan han tar lang a nga, a hming an phuah sen loh, “Chumi huai, khami huai,” an tih chu kan ziak lang vek seng dawn lo a ni.

  1. Chowngchawi : Mizo-in ‘Lasi’ kan tih ang deuh hi a ni a, mihringte a zawl ṭhin a, hmeichhiat mipatnarte pawh hmanpui ṭhin ni in an sawi. A mi zawlte chuan a lung an tihawi loh chuan tihhlum mai pawh a hmang ni in an sawi. Chu a zawlte chuan an Chowngchawi zawl tan chuan kum khatah vawikhat bawng chhun in Chowngchawi hnen a inthawihna an hlan ṭhin tur a ni.

Ramhuai dangte angin thiltihtheihna a nei lo a ni ang, chuvangin a zawl a te awlsam tak a malsawm theihna a neih loh a vangin mi hmuh loh lai in a zawl a te ri a mi buh a ruk sakin a zawl a te buh dahnaah a dah ṭhin a vangin Chowngchawi zawlte nen a inri emaw, an lo ep a lo neih chu tumah in an duh ṭhin lo.

A pian hmang ni a an sawi dan chu, mihring hmel ang tho an pu a, khamahte an cheng ṭhin ni in an sawi. Achang chuan an bawng chhunnaah te pawh an lo tel ve ṭhin a, an bawng chhunna a an lo tel ve chuan an kham tur a an ngaih a ruai sa chu a zo duak duak a, an kham ta ṭhin lo a ni. Chowngchawi zawltu in a zawl Chowngchawi tan a bawng a chhun chuan Chowngchawi chu ti hian hla in a ko ṭhin:

Uadi ü, ua da òw,

Uadi saiche rawng phua towm ü, towm ü,

Uadi saiche rawng phua towm ü, towm ü, ti in.

  1. Uimukmama : Hei hi Mizo in Phung kan tih kha a ni a, Apianhmang chu hmeichhia ang, hmui zum rut leh lian tak a ni. Mit lian tak a ni bawk a, a ni hian mihringte a tih buai dan chu, Mi mut lai in a lo hmet ṭhin a, chung a mi hmeh a te chu “Maimi zial” kan tih ang hian an awm ṭhin a, engemaw chang phei chuan mi kawchhungah te pawh lut ṭhin ni in an ngai.
  2. Chungkruh : Khawhring kan tih ang hi a ni a, “Langke chungkru” an ti deuh kher ṭhin, chu chu “Bawm Khawhring” tihna a ni. Bawm ho zingah khawhring hi atam bik an ti a. Khawhring nei a an ngaihte chu an haw em em a, tihhlum ngei an duh a, an tihhlum tak sawi tur pawh an awm nual reng a ni.
  3. Saingphak : He ramhuai hi mi seh ṭhin a an ngaih a ni a, mi tihthaih pawh a ching niin an ngai. Dawithiam te’n dawi in an ko chhuak ṭhin a, an mi huat zawngte an seh hlum tir ṭhin.
  4. Sitsi : Hei hi mi in a huat zawng nghaisa tur leh ti hlum tura ramhuai an khawi ṭhin a ni a. Dawi lehkha hmangin hetiang ramhuai hi an khawi ṭhin. Mi dawi nan hian hawrawp hman bik an nei a, chu an hawrawp hman ṭhin chu Kawl hawrawp hi a ni. He ramhuai hi dawi lehkha kawltu hnen apiangah a awm ṭhin. He ramhuai khawitu ni a an hriat pawh hi an haw em em a, tih hlum ngei an duh ṭhin.
  1. Măt : Hei pawh hi Lasi kan tih nen a inang deuh a, ramsa zawng zawng enkawltuah an ngai. An pianhmang chu mihring ang tho a ni a, mahse mihring ai chuan a te zawk daih a ni. Ramsa lian deuhte chu a zui ṭhin a, engemaw chang phei chuan sapeltu te’n a kehniak an hmuh ṭhin thu an sawi. Engemaw chang phei chuan thangawkte a lo ru ṭhin a, achang chuan ram kalte hi a hruaibo ṭhin nite in an sawi.
  2. Mururowng : Heng ramhuaite hi mihring angin khua te an nei ve a, achang chuan bawngte pawh an chhun ve ni in an sawi. Mihring mithmuhah an inlar ngai vak lova, an bawng chhun a an lam leh an hlim thawmte, an naupang rak ri chel chulte chu hriat tur a awm ṭhin.

Miria, bawng chhun a lam tur te’n an tumphung an indaih lo a nih chuan Mururowng ho hnenah inthawihna hlan in chung an thil mamawh chu Mururowngte hnenah an hawh thei nite pawh in an sawi. Mihring an tibuai ve ngai lova, achang chuan an bawng chhunna a puithiam hna thawk turin mihring puithiamte an rawn sawm chang a awm e an ti. Achang chuan bazarahte pawh an kal ve nite pawh in an sawi.

  1. Philu : Hei hi chu ramhuai lian leh koham tak, mihringte pawh ei ṭhin ni in an ngai a, tuifinriatah a cheng deuh ber in an ngai.
  2. Barua :Hei pawh hi dawi leh dawi lehkha hmang a mihringin an khawi chi ni in an ngai a, dawi hmang a ramhuai khawi chi-ah chuan a chak ber ni in an ngai.
  3. Malimala : Hei hi boruak huai a ni a, thli leh, khawchhiat, khawṭhat leh khawkhenah thu nei in an ngai a, a hnenah an inthawih ṭhin.
  4. Krawngma namma nam : Hei hi lei lam malsawmna pe ṭhin tuah leh anchhia pawh lawh theituah an ngai a, a hnenah inthawihna an hlan ṭhin.
  5. Taping kuila : Hei hi tap huai ni in an ngai a, a lan dan chu uipa ang hi a ni. Nau then bawm a nau inthente hi a lo tihṭhaih ṭhin ni in an ngai. Naupang kaihte hi a tihah an ngai a ni.
  6. Dawngtua namma : An in kailawn hi thing pum rek dawh a ni ṭhin a, chu an in a kailawn pawh chuan huai neiah an ngai a, hei hi chu leihlawn huai chu a ni. Mi a tibuai hran lova, achang chuan a inlar ṭhin a, a lan dan chu pitar sam tuak var vek tawh ang hi a ni.
  7. Pungdaka : Hei hi ramhuai zawng zawng a chak berah an ngai.
  8. Phuk : Mizovin “Tulum” kan tih ang hi a ni a, mithi tawh kawchhung a lut in mithi tawh chu a thawh tir leh a, engemaw chang phei chuan mithi tawh ruang hmang chuan mihring la damlaite a ei ṭhin ni in an ngai. Mihring dam laite chu chakna pawh a pe thei ni in an ngai bawk.
  9. Mihring a ramhuai pasarihte : Mihring pakhat zelah hian ramhuai pasarih zel awmah an ngai a, chung ramhuai te chuan mihringte chu karkhat zel an inven chhawk ni in an ngai a. Chung ramhuai pasarih-te zing a pakhat “Ruhu” an tih chuan ni a chang ve lova, chutia a chùan tak a vang chuan mihring vengtu a piang hnenah chuan a lo tel ve zel ṭhin a, chung ramhuai zingah chuan aṭha pakhat chiah a awm a, chu chu “Lümsawilami” an ti. Adang zawng chu thlarau sual vek an ni.

BUNG 20

RAMHUAI AWMNA NI A AN NGAIH LEH AN HLAUHTE

Miriate hian ramhuai ni a an ngaihte a tam ang bawk a, ramhuai awmna ni a an ngaih pawh a tam hle mai a, chuvang chuan hlauh apui pawh an ngah em em reng a ni. Chung ramhuai awmna ni a an ngaih leh an hlauhte chu hengte hi an ni :

  1. Sih.
  2. Hmawng kung.
  3. Lung lian, mum mam pelpul, “Nat hua” an ti.
  4. Kham.
  5. Vapual ruang tawih awmna.
  6. Zawng ruang tawih awmna.
  7. Mau phir.
  8. Bal kuang phir.
  9. Thil kaw lian deuh, a kiang a bel hun chuan.
  10. Kawr a lei ang a indawh kai.
  11. Lui infinna lai.
  12. Lo inzawn.
  13. Lo pahnih neih a chu mi lo inkar a mithi halna a awm chuan.
  14. Mi hawi loh zawng a in sak.
  15. Zawng lamna. Ramhnuai a hmun bel hluau a lo awm chuan.
  16. Leiruangtuam.

Heng bâkah pawh hian thil dang hlauh an la ngah em em mai a. Hlauhna bawihah an la tan miau a vangin an hlauh zawng chu ziak vek sen pawh a ni lo. Hmelma pa Diabawla bumna a vangin an rilru, an taksa chu hlauhna in a fan chhuak hneh em em mai a.

Kan hmelma pa Setana chuan nawmsip bawlna chithlum an hmuiah a tah sak leh zeuh ṭhin bawk si nen. Anni lahin Setana’n a salah a man a ni tih reng reng hre lovin anmahni ai a fing em em zawk; anmahni bum a a thang a awh tirtu ramhuai, Setana chu “Ka bum e,” ti in, vawktĕ leh artĕ a an inthawihte chuan, “Hei vawkpa sum ruk in ka rawn inthawih e, a sa ṭha ṭha ka pe che a nih hi,” an ti a. A sa chhia chhia tlemte an pe a, a bâk zawng chu anmahni in an ei vek ṭhin a. Kan unau Miria te hi an tànna Setana bawih a ṭang hian chhanchhuah an va ngai tak em.

BUNG 21

DAN BAWHCHHIAT A VANGA CHAWI THEIHNATE

Bung hmasa lamah khan Miria te hian inngaihdamna an tlakchham thu kan sawi tawh a, thil an tihsual palh pawh in a phu tawk hremna emaw, chawi tir an ni deuh zel ṭhin a ni. Ṭanpui ngaite an ṭanpui pawh hian thabat ang deuh a ni zawkmah a, entirnan; Damlo zawn emaw, inkang ṭhelhpui leh thil dangah pawh ṭanpuina dawngtu chuan amah ṭanpuitu te chu ruai a buatsaih sak ngei a ngai ṭhin.

Mire ram a kal emaw, awm emaw chuan hetiang hi hriat ngei a ngai a ni. Athuhrimah mi an lo changkang zel a, keini Mizote pawh ram dangah, hnam dang zing a khawsa kan tam ve tulh tulh a, hnamdang zing a kan awm hian kan awmna hnamte kan zir chiang in fimkhur thiam hi a ngai hle a ni. Heng dan bawhchhiat a vanga chawi theihnate phei hi chu kan hriat ngei ngei a ngai a, kan awmna hnamte azir in an hnam dan erawh chu a dang ngei ang. An hnam dan pawh kan zah sak thiam angaihna tam tak a awm ṭhin bawk a ni.

Mire hnam zinga dan bawhchhiat a vanga chawi theihnate chu hengte hi an ni:

  1. Nula leh tlangval chesual lai an hmuh a thubuai an siam chuan tlangval chu vawk an chhun (chawi) tir ṭhin. Chu chu “Iang pak” an ti. Nula chu a lo rai chuan a raitu chuan Tk 5 a chawi tur a ni a, chu chu, “Kan khang dawng” (Hmeichhia in nau a neih hun a chawhmeh a nghei lai a a hman tur a ni).
  2. Mi nu leh pa hmeichhiat mipatna kawng a an chesual lai mi in an hmu a thubuai an siam a nih chuan mipa chu vawk an chhun (Chawi) tir ṭhin. Hei pawh hi “Iang pak” an ti tho. Hmeichhia chu a pasal in a nei duh tawh lo a nih chuan a nupui man chu hmeichhe nu leh pa te’n an pe let leh vek tur a ni.

Mipa chuan a nupui a uire san manah a puzawn chu Tk 70 leh Silver tangka 3 ape a nga, chubakah a puzawn chu ar a talh sak a nga, a pizawn leh a puzawnte ke a dawm in ngaihdam a dil ngei tur a ni.

  1. An pindan, “Kimma” an tihah a neitu phalna la hmasa lova mi a luh chuan pawisa emaw, vawk emaw chawi tir theih a ni. An pindan a aneitu planna lova mi a luh a vawk an chhun tir chuan vawk lung leh a kal chu mautheiah aiduchhe bal eichi nen an chhum a nga, chu chuan an inthawih tur a ni.

A tisualtu chuan, “Ka lo tisual a, he inah hian natna emaw, thil ṭhalo emaw thleng lo turin ka inthawih e,” a ti tur a ni. A vawksa chhumna mau chawng chu a chhumna hmunah nikhat a dah a nga, Tk 70 a chawi bawk tur a ni.

  1. Midang hliam palh in a hliam dan a zirin a hliamtu chuan pawisa a chawi tur a ni.
  2. Hmeichhe phalna lova mipa in a hnute a khawih a hmeichhia chu a thinrim chuan a hnute khawihtu mipa chuan hmeichhia in a phut zat zat pawisa a chawi tur a ni.
  3. Meichher chhi a mi thlam lam a kal a, mi thlam chu a kang a nih chuan meichher chhitu chuan a hal lai hmu ker lo mahse meichher kengtupa chuan vawk emaw, pawisa emaw a chawi tur a ni.
  4. Lo hal vang emaw a khawram (khaw hmun hlui) a kan chuan a ti kangtu chuan vawk a chawi tur a ni.
  5. Lo thlai sengkhawm zawh hma a nula leh tlangval inru mi thlam a an riak, thlam neitu in a hriat chuan nula leh tlangval inru te chuan vawk an chawi tur a ni.
  6. Mi nu, nula ang a chhaih emaw, an lungawi loh zawng a khawih palh emaw chuan a khawih/chhaihtu mipa chuan zu a chawi tur a ni a, chu chu “Pri” an ti. A tisualtu chuan akhawih/chhaih chu a pute lam a nih chuan fei a chawi tel tur a ni a, a tute lam a nih erawh chuan zu bakah diar var tawng nga ai a tawi lo leh silver tangka 15 – 17 a chawi tur a ni.
  7. Mi in nupui a neih lai in a puzawn tan ar a chum sak a nga, a puzawn tan a a ar talh danah emaw, a chum danah emaw a puzawn a lungawi lo a nih chuan a arsa chhum chu a paih vek a nga, a dang a chhum sak leh a nga, a mâkpa chuan a tihsual manah fei pakhat leh zu um khat a chawi bawk tur a ni.
  8. Mi in lo a thlai ramhuai hnen a hlan hma a a lo ei palh emaw, a tihchhiat palh chuan lo neitu in a phut zat ang a piang a chawi tur a ni.
  9. An khaw hung/serh lai a lut emaw, chhuak emaw, bengchheng lo siam emaw chuan khaw hung inthawihna an ran senso, ar emaw vawk emaw a chawi tur a ni.
  10. Kharbari te pindanah an monu lo mutpui emaw sual emaw chuan Silver tangka (lukawlh chuang ngei) a chawi a nga, kharbari chu ar a talh sak a nga, ngaihdam a dil bawk tur a ni.
  11. Mi fanu tlangval in a ru a, nula chhungte chuan an um a, a rutu te’n mo lawmna ran an lo talh tawh a, an fanu chu mo lawmna ran an talh hma a an lak kir leh tur thu sawi lawk si lova an va hruai chhuak leh a nih chuan an fanu rutu te mo lawmna ran talh man chu nula chhungte chuan an chawi vek tur a ni.
  12. Mi in nupui a neih lain a puzawnte lam chuan achipuite leh a mâkpate chipui lam chu tunhma in emaw intihthiamlohna an neih tawh leh neih loh an chhui a nga, anmahni in an hriat mai loh pawh in midang an zawt a nga, engemaw thu hlaah an mâkpate hnam leh anmahni hnam chu intihthiamlohna a lo awm tawh ni a an hriat chuan a mâkpa chu Silver tangka 5 emaw a chawi tir ṭhin. Ṭhenkhat chuan chutiang a ti kher lote pawh an awm bawk.

Hnam dan hi a hmun leh a hun a zir in a danglam ve thei a, hei hi hemi lehkhabu ka ziak lai a Mire hnam zing a an dan bawhchhiat a vang a chawi theihna ṭhenkhat a ni a, ka ziak kim vek lovang tih erawh ka ring a ni.

BUNG 22

AN SILHFEN LEH AN INCHEINATE

Miriate hi hnam chapo ve tak, hnam dang tih dan a ṭha zawk a ni tih pawh hria se la duh mang miah lo hnam an ni a, chuvang chuan an chhehvel a hnam dangte ngaihtuah chuan an la hniam em em a ni. Mahse Mire ram a Kristian na a lo chak deuh tak hnu hi chuan kawng tam takin hma an sawn tawh a, mahse heta kan sawi tur hi chu Mire ram a ka awmtirh lai leh Mire hnam zinga Kristian na in hmun a la chan loh lai a an silhfen leh an incheinate a ni ka rawn tarlang dawn a ni.

An mutbu leh an thuamhnaw hi anmahni la thàr a ṭang a an kaih a an tah a ni tlangpui a, hmeichhiate chuan hmanlai Mizo hmeichhiate ang bawkin la deh hi an peih em em mai a, hmeichhia ni si la deh thiam lo chu mi ngaihsan an hlawh lo a ni. Nula te pawhin an mut hma chu la an kai ṭhin a, lo a an fehnaah pawh la kaih tur an keng a, an chhun chawlh laite pawhin ṭhenkhat chuan la an kai ṭhin. Ṭhalaite an han inchei tak tak chu thawmhnaw an mamawh vak lo na in thil dang mamawh leh inbel neuh neuh an ngah ve hle thung.

An incheinate chu hengte hi a ni :

  1. Lu-ah :
    1. Samzial : Hmeichhi

leh mipa te’n an sam an zial a, hmeichhia chuan an tukkhumah an sam an zial a, mipa chuan an chhipah emaw, an bek ding lam deuhah emaw an sam an zial ṭhin.

    1. Kâp : Hriaupui hi a mawng lamah tlêp in an ṭawn a

la mawi in an chei leh a, chu chu nula te’n an samzialah an vit lut ṭhin.

    1. Nabek surut : Mau, rua, Alluminium in emaw, samkhuih lianpui kual vùn mai hian an siam a, nula leh tlangval te’n an samzialah inchei nan an hmang ṭhin.
    2. Surut :

Samkhuih hi an ngina em em a, ahnung lam tlang hi an chei a, chu chu khawi hmunah pawh kal se an samzialah a hmei a pa in an tawn reng ṭhin.

    1. Hnah leh pangpar : Nula te chuan hnah leh pangpar hi an samzialah hian an tawn deuh reng ṭhin a, an hunpui lai chuan lehkhamawi leh pawisa te, darthlalang te pawh an samzialah an tawn bawk ṭhin.
    2. Taibawia : Ṭhi chikhat a ni a, arawng sen emaw a hring emaw tam tak an thil ṭeuh a, an lu-ah an khim ṭhin.
    3. Kapsaw : Hei pawh hi an ṭhi ang chi a an siam a ni a, a mum hring fim te tak te te , khap khat zen zawn a sei in an thil ṭeuh a, a bul lamah an ṭawn khawm a, an sam zial a vih luh turin dawhkilh ang in an siam a, chu chu an samzial a vit lut in hnung lamah a uai hnuang ṭhin.
    4. Kowlüchowh : Silver tangka khat hi a laiah an dah a, asirah a hual chhuakin pawisa 25/50 thir an char (welding) vek a, chu chu nula leh tlangval te’n an samzialah an tawn ṭhin.
    5. Tangka dân : Silver tangka khat hi a laiah an samzial a vih luhna tur a kuang an welding a, chu chu nula leh tlangval te’n an samzialah an tawn ṭhin.
    6. Vakul chang : Nula ṭhenkhat chuan an hunpui a an inchei chuan an samzialah vakul chang an tawn ṭhin.
    7. Maipau : Bawng/sial an chhun a an lam lai te hian tlangval te’n halzit an hal a, a ṭek mawi lai takin nula lam lai samzialah an va tawn ṭhin.
    8. Si lumem : Pawisa thir hi a thilna an siam a, an lu vet chhuak thei turin an thil ṭeuh a, chu chu nulate’n an luah khim in inchei nan an hmang ṭhin.
    9. Keng ring lumem : Thi chikhat rawng sen tam tak an thil ṭeuh a, nula te’n an lu-ah khim in inchei nan an hmang ṭhin.
    10. Derkeng : Ṭhi amum eng an thil chu Keng ring lumem sir tuak veve ah an khim ṭhin.
    11. Napawng (Diar) : Hna an thawhna leh khual an zinnaah chuan an khim ngei ngei ṭhin. Diar var hi an inchawimawi nan leh an induhsakna tih lan nan an hmang bawk ṭhin, tawng nga ai a tawi lo a ni tlangpui.
    12. Chemte : Mipate chuan Mizo angin chemte hi an ngaina hle a, khual an zin chuan an samzialah emaw, an diarah emaw a kawm an siam a, an vit lut ṭhin.
  1. Bengah :
    1. Ramseng : Bengbeh Silver a siam, Mizo paikawng ang deuh a arh, a mawng lam pawh beng a atàn theih nan a arh hlek, hmeichhia te’n an beh ṭhin. Ṭhenkhat chuan an bengbeh chhungah chuan an vaihlo ṭhial tur emaw, pawisa emaw an dah ṭhin.
    2. Tai ramseng : Silver emaw, dar emaw a siam kual pan thler mai hi mipa in an beh ṭhin.
    3. Napung ramseng : Hei pawh hi a bial, pan thler, rangkachak a siam mipa beh chi a ni. Mihausa deuh chauh in an beh ṭhin.
    4. Powtu : La hmul sen chi, an ti dip a, abawk rual takin an siam a, alaiah a hring leh a eng sen an dah a, abehna tur a kŭang an siam a, hmeichhia leh mipa in an beh ṭhin.
    5. Ramseng saw : Mipa te’n bial pante an beh a an khai chhawn leh ṭhin a ni.
    6. Pin : Putar bengbeh nei ve lo te’n pin hi an beh ve mai ṭhin.
  2. Hmaiah : Nula leh tlangval an han inchei tak tak chu an hmaiah Powder paw tawk tak mai in an inhnawih a. Tunhma chuan an ha hi an ti dum vek a, an tihdumna hmanrua chu mau no ro an phel phawk a, chu chu an hal a, a alh lai chuan chem chhia phekah an khup thawk a, chumi khu ur chu inṭing dum khâk tlat ang mai hian a awm a, chumi chuan an ha chu an ti dum ṭhin a, an damchhungin a lo dum tawh mai ṭhin a ni.

An ha an tih dumna chhan chu ha var ai chuan ha dum hi mawi an tih vang zawk a ni. Ha var an hmuh chuan, “Ui ha ang mai a var ṭhuh,” an ti ṭhin a ni. Ha tih dum an bansan hnu hian ha leh hmui mai duh tawk lovin lei leh ka chhung thleng in an ti sen ve thung a, chutia an tihsen na hmanruai chu puan tih senna rawng hi a ni. Chumai chu la duhtawk lovin an khabe, hmui hnuai lamahte an ti sen leh ṭhin, ṭhenkhat chuan an biangahte leh an chalahte pawh an ti sen bawk. An hmui hnuai chiah-ah + tiang hian a sen in an nulate chuan an thai ṭhin.

  1. Nghawngah :
    1. Kengrawt (Ṭhi sen).
    2. Keng buk (Ṭhi phiar mum).
    3. Langke chah (Ṭhi phiar phek).
    4. Mangku keng (Sarzuk mu thi).Hei hi nau chhartu te’n an nau char hlawh a an lak ṭhin a ni. An ṭhiah chuan an ngaihsan ber pawl a ni a, mahse a awrh nuamlo ber a ni ang. Nula te chuan an hunawl ah chuan ṭhi hi an thil deuh reng ṭhin.
  2. Bân-ah :
    1. Kuarma kuaise (Vainu banbun/ngun) :
    2. Tai kuaise : Silver a siam, lian deuh, akualah a thlur ang deuh a awm.
    3. Bawtraw kuaise : Apawn lam a mum a, a mum laiah a rek deuhin a awm leh.
    4. Kuaise : Banbun pangngai, Alluminium a an chhun chawp a ni.
    5. Harkawi : Hmeichhia in an kiu chung chiah a an bun a ni a, Silver hmang a siam a ni a, an bun tirh chuan an ban puam lai tawt angreng takin thir inchi khat vel a hlaiin a hren tlat a vangin chaw bâr tur a kut han tawm pawh an harsat phah ṭhin a ni.
    6. Langpat : An ṭhi ang chi, aphek a phiar tlangval in an bampuam laiah an bun ṭhin.
    7. Rutbüt : Zungbun Silver tangka 25 a siam. An ṭhi ang chi pawh zungbun a tan mawi tak in an phiar a, an bun bawk ṭhin.
  3. Taksa-ah :
    1. Kowrma : Ṭhenkhat chuan an hnathawh lai in anmahni la kaih a ṭanga tah an ha ṭhin a, a hmei a pa in kawr hak ai chuan hak loh hi nuam ti zawk an tam hle.
    2. Tawnzau : Tawnzau, ahring emaw, a sen emaw, apawl emaw, lai pawh khuh ṭha mang lovin tawt ṭingṭeng in an ha ṭhin.
    3. Uancha-khup : Hmeichhia te’n a chang chuan puanhlap, asen emaw, a hring emaw, a pawl emaw an kokiah suih in an archang pai mai ṭhin.
    4. Tangka leng : Silver tangka khat leh darkhuang lem te tak te, ke a an bun ri chheng chheng theih chi ‘Te’ngeng’ sei deuh angte pawh chu a thilna kua an siam a, chu chu fual angreng takin an siam a, nula te’n incheina hlu leh ngaihsan awm takah an ngai ṭhin. Atlangpuiin mihausa fanu te deuh chauh in an pai thei ṭhin a ni.
  4. Kawngh/mawng bawrah :
    1. Tapungh dawng : Hei hi naupuakpuan hrenpereng a ni a, anmahni lakaih a ṭanga an tah a ni. An nau puakpuan nen a inang a, mahse hrenpereng hi chu a sei fe zawk a ni. Tunlaiah chuan vai puan pan an hmang tawh a, a zangkhai fe tawh a ni. Mipa in an hren thin a ni.
    2. Uanklai towng (Fèn phel) : Mizo hmarâm ai hi chuan a chhing zawk a, hnung lamah mawng zawnah tak hian a zia a awm a, an zeh lai hian vawk hmul an zep tel a, mahse an tah zawhah vawk hmul chu an pawt phawi leh vek a, chhung lamah chuan a zehna a lang miah lo a ni.

Hmeichhe pawnfen hi a chhin em a vangin ṭhut fimkhur reng a ngai a, ṭhut lan an hlauh a an fimkhur a vangin an ṭhut dawn leh an din dawnin an ṭhingṭhit ṭhin a vangin an hmeichhiate khup chu a khak deuh tlul ṭhin a ni. A rawng chu a dum a ni.

A pum a, mahse an ven chuan athuah in an veng a, an mal veilam chu a lang deuh vek ṭhin, An hrenna laiah pin in emaw an chilh a, a nihloh chuan an kawnghren in an hreng bet mai ṭhin.

    1. Lawnggi : Mipa ṭhenkhat chuan vai in an ven ṭhin Lawnggi an veng ve ṭhin.
    2. Ruakawm : Silver zai phiar mum, 2 -10 thleng hmeichhe kawnghren a ni a, aman pawh a to khawp mai.
    3. Si kekawm : Pawisa thir, pawisa 25 a thilna an siam a, tam tak an thil a, chu chu an kawngah an hreng ṭhin.
    4. Taiuih : Silver thir kil nei a siàm, lian vak lo chu

hmeichhia te’n an mawng bawrah an hreng ṭhin.

    1. Langke : An ṭhi ang chi phiar phek chu nula leh tlangval in an kawngah an hreng ṭhin.
    2. Langke buk : An ṭhi ang chi phiar mum chu nula leh tlangval te’n an kawngah an hreng ṭhin.
    3. Chiakaidawng (Kekawrtlawn) : Kekawrtlawn an hak tirh hian an sawisel nasa em em a, kekawrtlawn hate diariam nan kekawrtlawn chu, “Bawng chhu hrenpereng” an ti a, chumi hming chu a pu hlen ta a ni.
  1. Ke-ah :
    1. Ro : Naupang in an bun ṭhin Te’ngeng.
    2. Khawkkhen : Nula in an lamna leh an incheina a an ngalrek a an bun ṭhin a, silver a siam te a ni a a kawrawng a, a kawrawngah chuan pên zawng a ri chhawng chhawng thei turin a chhungah thir mum dah a ni.
    3. Khawk ro : Hei pawh hi nula in a lam dawn a a bun ṭhin bawk a ni a, Khawkkhen ai chuan a lian deuh a, khawkkhen nen hian an bun tlang ṭhin.

Miriate hian an fate hi an tet lai aṭangin an nghawngah leh an kawngah la hrual emaw tal chu an awrh tir in an hren tir ṭhin a ni. Mipa te chuan an ram kal in an hrenperengah an chempui hriam tak chu an pai ṭhin a, engemaw chang a kawng nal a an tluk palh chang in an chempui pai chuan an khel a ât duai chang pawh a awm ṭhin a, mahse chutiang a mipa khel a chempui in a ahna ser lianpui pui awm te chu mipa diktak nihna ni in an ngai.
